history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A group of people rides scooters or motorcycles along a tree-lined road in bright daylight.

Main Subject:
The visual focus is on several riders seen from behind, each on a two-wheeled vehicle, moving away from the camera in the middle of a wide street.

Setting:
The scene is outdoors on a paved road with tall leafy trees lining both sides. Bright sunlight creates high-contrast shadows on the pavement. In the distance, more riders and vehicles are visible, and on the right side there are parked or stationary structures and bicycles/scooter-like items.

Visual Details:
In the foreground, three riders dominate the frame, all viewed from behind. They wear casual tops and have backpacks or bag-like items attached to their backs or around their shoulders. Each rider’s vehicle has large, treaded tires; one vehicle in the front appears to have a dark body with a bag mounted at the rear. The rider on the far right has a circular patch-like design on the back area of the bag and a bright red/orange detail near the lower back. The riders’ clothing and gear are mostly dark with some lighter elements, and their posture is seated and upright while they ride forward. The camera angle is centered and slightly low, capturing the road perspective leading into the background. Tree trunks and dense green foliage fill the top half of the image, with sunlight filtering through leaves and creating patterned light across the roadway.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows multiple riders on two-wheeled vehicles traveling down a sunlit road. They are moving away from the camera under tall trees, with more riders visible further down the street.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No visible text detected in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- **Text content:** None found (image appears to be a street scene with riders; no readable UI, captions, signs, or overlays).

# Notes

- There may be very small or distant text not legible at this resolution. If you share a higher-resolution screenshot or a zoomed-in crop of any signage/labels, I can extract that text too.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
